file_insights.summary: Replaced placeholder text with comprehensive Android SDK installation documentation
key_additions: Two installation methods (Android Studio recommended vs command-line tools)
Environment variable configuration for all platforms
Both GUI and CLI installation approaches

patterns_discovered.description: Instructions organized by OS (Windows/macOS/Linux) with platform-specific commands and paths
patterns_discovered.frequency: Applied consistently across all major sections

patterns_discovered.description: Both GUI-based (Android Studio) and CLI-based (command-line tools) installation methods documented
Each installation section includes verification steps with expected outputs
Instructions progress from download → installation → configuration → verification → additional components

gotchas_discovered.description: Windows uses AppData\Local\Android\Sdk, macOS uses ~/Library/Android/sdk, Linux uses ~/Android/Sdk
gotchas_discovered.impact: Environment variable setup must be platform-specific

gotchas_discovered.description: Modern macOS uses Zsh by default, but some systems still use Bash; different config files required
gotchas_discovered.impact: Users must check their shell before editing configuration files

gotchas_discovered.description: Environment variables don't take effect until Command Prompt/PowerShell is restarted
gotchas_discovered.impact: Common source of user confusion when adb/sdkmanager commands fail

gotchas_discovered.description: Initial installation requires ~5 GB download with 3 GB free space minimum
Downloaded Android Studio triggers security dialog requiring explicit user action
gotchas_discovered.impact: Automated/silent installation not possible on macOS

gotchas_discovered.description: Android SDK requires 32-bit libraries (i386) even on 64-bit Linux systems
gotchas_discovered.impact: Additional setup step required before Android Studio launch

approach_outcome.coverage: All major platforms (Windows, macOS, Linux) with detailed step-by-step instructions
approach_outcome.implementation_notes: Replaced 3-line placeholder with 625 lines of detailed, actionable documentation including GUI and CLI methods, environment setup, and verification procedures

recommendations.recommendation: Add dedicated troubleshooting section for common installation issues (adb not found, gradle daemon errors, SDK license issues)
Prominently highlight minimum disk space (3 GB free) and download size (5 GB) at beginning of section
Add section on proxy configuration and corporate firewall considerations
Consider adding screenshot references or links to video guides for complex GUI steps
Include guidance on version pinning and handling SDK updates in existing installations
Add optional HAXM/KVM acceleration setup instructions for faster emulator performance
